title: Laura Ashley 24cm Non Stick Frying Pan - Stylish BPA, PFOA-Free Forged Aluminium Frying Pan for Induction Hob - Easy to Wash & Oven Safe - Multi-Hob Compatible - 10 Years Guarantee - Dark Dove Grey
features: Classic Laura Ashley Design: Elevate your kitchen with the 24cm frying pans nonstick from the iconic Laura Ashley collection, blending timeless style with practical functionality for a sophisticated cooking experience

Premium Non-Stick Performance: Enjoy effortless cooking with the 3-layer, PFOA-free non-stick coating that ensures even heat distribution and eliminates hot spots. The non stick pan provide perfect results every time, with minimal oil

Generous 24cm Size: The 24cm diameter and 4.2cm depth make this frying pan perfect for frying, searing, and sautéing larger portions, providing ample space for cooking family meals or entertaining guests with ease

Versatile & Easy Cleanup: Compatible with all hob types, including induction, and oven-safe up to 240°C. Plus, its non-stick surface makes cleanup a breeze, just wipe clean or pop the induction pan in the dishwasher
Durable Material: Built to last with a premium forged aluminium body, this frying pan ensures even heat distribution, preventing hot spots for reliable, consistent cooking results
description: Meet the Laura Ashley Non-Stick frying pan for induction hob by Pendeford, the perfect companion for your culinary creations! Available in various sizes, this egg frying pan is expertly crafted from high-quality forged aluminium, ensuring exceptional heat distribution for even cooking every time. Say goodbye to stuck-on food! The 3-layers PFOA-free non-stick coating in the non stick pans makes frying and sautéing a breeze, allowing you to whip up everything from fluffy omelettes to perfectly seared veggies without the hassle of cleanup. Designed for comfort these induction pans have stainless-steel handle is ergonomically shaped and remains cool to the touch, providing a secure grip as you flip and stir. This versatile camping frying pan works wonderfully on all hob types, including induction, ceramic, gas, & electric, so you can cook with confidence no matter your setup. When you’re finished cooking, simply toss neverstick frying pan the in the dishwasher or pop it in the oven, as this non toxic pans are oven-safe up to 180°C and built to handle it all. With a timeless design and dependable performance, all our non stick frying pans comes with a 10-year warranty for added peace of mind.
